free_text: Neutron radiative capture in Na, Al, Fe, and Ni from 1
Ta target. Polyethylene disc used to moderate
photoneutrons into the resonance energy region.
Flux monitored by B10(4)C-NaI crystals on
The 5.19-eV resonance of Ag was used to determine the
absolute number of neutrons by the saturated resonance
Integrated resonance capture from the 60.2-eV Au
BIB update. Converted to lower case.
Pure Al metal - 7.93cm diameter. Sample thickness
Flight path 25.44 m, channel width 0.04 microsec,
Data rec'd on punched cards, Block, 68/5
Pure Fe metal - 7.93cm diameter. Sample thickness
Flight path 25.44 m, channel width 0.01 microsec,
Data rec'd on punched cards, Block, 68/5
Pure Ni metal - 7.93cm diameter. Sample thickness
Data rec'd on punched cards, Block, 68/5
